prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat/Lancia 2.0L 16V Turbo (engine code: 838A1.000) with a custom-built Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, ported and polished cylinder head by Novitec, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with equal-length headers and a 2.5-inch center section terminating in dual 110mm outlets

Full forged internals by JE Pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio) with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, ARP head studs, and a custom billet crankshaft by Manley, paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU for sequential fuel injection and individual cylinder tuning

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom-valved front struts, and rear shock mounts reinforced with polybushings by Powerflex, alongside a full chassis reinforcement kit by Sabelt including a bolt-in roll cage and strut tower braces
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Zender (1980s Group B-inspired) with riveted aluminum overfenders, extended steel rear quarters, and a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards by APR Performance

Full custom interior retrim in Alcantara with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (Lancia Beta Coupe-specific mounting brackets), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum gauge pod housing Stack analog gauges (oil pressure, boost, and AFR)

Bespoke 16x9-inch ET0 BBS RS wheels (gold centers) wrapped in 225/45R16 Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires, paired with custom front and rear brake kits by Brembo (4-piston calipers up front, 2-piston rear) with drilled and slotted rotors by EBC
